use_codes.desc: RAISE FOLATE LEVELS IN WOMEN WHO CHOOSE TO USE AN ORAL CONTRACEPTIVE AS THEIR METHOD OF CONTRACEPTION FOR THE PURPOSE OF REDUCING THE RISK OF A NEURAL TUBE DEFECT IN A PREGNANCY
